positive: A stylish, minimalistic representation of a celestial fox spirit (kitsune) leaping through a field of glowing bioluminescent cherry blossoms. The fox should have an ethereal, glowing silhouette with nine tails and adopt a dynamic, graceful pose. The scene is dominated by deep indigo night blues and vibrant neon pinks/cyans from the blossoms and magical energy. Use a high-contrast, graphic novel aesthetic with strong linework and negative space to emphasize the silhouette. Central composition, vector illustration quality, perfect for screen printing on apparel. Dramatic backlighting, ethereal glow, hyper-detailed linework, symmetrical balance.
negative: blurry, photo, realism, photorealistic, 3d render, grainy, low detail, artifacts, text, logo, watermark, extra limbs, bad anatomy, distorted, cropped, noisy, oversaturated, amateur
